content.text: The hide-reason popover lives on the position card — I'll inspect its markup and positioning CSS next.
The popover uses fixed positioning with viewport coords — I'll check whether a parent transform or stacking context is offsetting it from the button.

Root cause: company-card hover uses `transform: translateY(-3px)`, which makes `position: fixed` popovers use the card as their containing block while JS still applies viewport coords — so the menu jumps. Anchoring it with absolute positioning to the button fixes that.

Fixed. The menu was using `position: fixed` with viewport coordinates, but hovering a company card applies `transform: translateY(-3px)`, which makes those coords resolve against the card instead of the viewport — so the popup jumped away from the button.

It now opens as an absolute menu under the **Not for me** button and stays anchored there. Hard-refresh the panel and try it again.

see the problem in mobile version
The screenshot shows the menu still drifting on mobile — I'll inspect the live layout and CSS for that viewport.
On mobile the menu opens below the button into the next card; ATS/filters already use a bottom sheet — I'll wire that same pattern for hide-reason.

On mobile the menu opens below the action row into the next card, and the card’s hover `transform` can steal absolute positioning. Opening it above the button and limiting that transform to fine pointers.
Simplifying mobile anchoring: open above the button and left-align it—centering can still clip near the screen edge.

On mobile the menu was opening **below** the action row, so it landed on the next company card and looked detached.

It now opens **above** the **Not for me** button (still left-aligned to it), and the card lift `transform` only runs on desktop hover so it can’t pull the menu off the button after a tap.

Hard-refresh on your phone and try again.

problem is exists

Absolute positioning is resolving against a tall parent, not the button. I'll portal the menu to `document.body` and place it with the trigger's `getBoundingClientRect()` so it stays glued to the button.

content.text:
The earlier CSS-only approach was still anchoring to a tall parent card, not the button. That’s fixed properly now:

1. Menu is moved to `document.body` when opened  
2. Placed with the button’s `getBoundingClientRect()` (above on mobile)  
3. Cache bust bumped (`styles.css?v=85`, `position-card.js?v=7`)

Hard-refresh the panel (`Cmd+Shift+R`) so `?v=7` / `?v=85` load, then try **Not for me** again in the iPhone emulator.

Scroll-to-close is likely firing as soon as the menu mounts and wiping it. I'll fix the open path so it stays open and stays anchored to the button.

content.text:
The menu was opening and then immediately closing — mounting it to `body` was firing a scroll handler that dismissed it right away.

That’s fixed: no scroll-to-close on open, and outside-tap closing is delayed so the opening tap doesn’t eat the menu. Cache bust is now `position-card.js?v=8`.

Hard-refresh the panel and try **Not for me** again.

import urllib.request
base='http://127.0.0.1:5051'
for path in ['/static/js/position-card.js?v=8','/static/js/utils.js','/static/js/render.js']:

        r=urllib.request.urlopen(base+path)
        print(path, r.status, r.headers.get('content-type'), 'bytes', len(r.read()))

# Check for circular imports / module eval errors via playwright if available
.venv/bin/python3 - <<'PY'
import asyncio
from pathlib import Path

try:
    from playwright.async_api import async_playwright
except ImportError:
    print('NO_PLAYWRIGHT')
    raise SystemExit(0)

async def main():
    async with async_playwright() as p:
        browser = await p.chromium.launch(headless=True)
        page = await browser.new_page(viewport={"width": 430, "height": 932})
        page.on('pageerror', lambda e: print('PAGEERROR', e))
        page.on('console', lambda m: print('CONSOLE', m.type, m.text) if m.type in ('error','warning') else None)
        await page.goto('http://127.0.0.1:5051/panel', wait_until='networkidle', timeout=30000)
        # maybe login wall
        content = await page.content()
        print('title', await page.title())
        print('has login', 'login' in content.lower()[:2000] or bool(await page.query_selector('#loginForm, .login-panel, input[name=password]')))
        print('position-card count', await page.locator('position-card').count())
        print('hide-reason-trigger count', await page.locator('.hide-reason-trigger').count())
        # Check module loaded
        ok = await page.evaluate('''() => !!customElements.get('position-card')''')
        print('custom element defined', ok)
        if await page.locator('.hide-reason-trigger').count() == 0:
            # try fill login if present
            user = page.locator('input[name=username], #username, input[type=text]').first
            pw = page.locator('input[name=password], #password, input[type=password]').first
            if await pw.count():
                print('login form present, cannot autologin without creds')
            await browser.close()
            return
        trigger = page.locator('.hide-reason-trigger').first
        await trigger.scroll_into_view_if_needed()
        await trigger.click(timeout=5000)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(300)
        floating = await page.locator('.hide-reason-popover.is-floating').count()
        visible = await page.locator('.hide-reason-popover:not([hidden])').count()
        body_pop = await page.evaluate('''() => {
          const p = document.body.querySelector('.hide-reason-popover');
          if (!p) return null;
          const r = p.getBoundingClientRect();
          return {hidden: p.hidden, className: p.className, parent: p.parentElement?.tagName, top: p.style.top, left: p.style.left, rect: {x:r.x,y:r.y,w:r.width,h:r.height}, display: getComputedStyle(p).display, visibility: getComputedStyle(p).visibility};
        }''')
        print('after click floating', floating, 'visible-not-hidden', visible, 'body_pop', body_pop)
        aria = await trigger.get_attribute('aria-expanded')
        print('aria-expanded', aria)
        await browser.close()

asyncio.run(main())
PY

# Local-only: read panel admin user from .env (not printed fully) and try login + click
.venv/bin/python3 - <<'PY'
import asyncio, re, os
from pathlib import Path
from playwright.async_api import async_playwright

env = Path('.env').read_text()
user = re.search(r'^PANEL_ADMIN_USER=(.*)$', env, re.M)
pw = re.search(r'^PANEL_ADMIN_PASSWORD=(.*)$', env, re.M)
username = (user.group(1).strip().strip('"').strip("'") if user else 'admin')
password = (pw.group(1).strip().strip('"').strip("'") if pw else '')
print('user', username, 'pw_len', len(password))

async def main():
    async with async_playwright() as p:
        browser = await p.chromium.launch(headless=True)
        page = await browser.new_page(viewport={"width": 430, "height": 932})
        errors=[]
        page.on('pageerror', lambda e: errors.append(str(e)))
        await page.goto('http://127.0.0.1:5051/panel', wait_until='networkidle')
        # login
        if await page.locator('input[type=password]').count():
            # try common fields
            for sel in ['#username','input[name=username]','input[type=text]']:
                if await page.locator(sel).count():
                    await page.fill(sel, username); break
            await page.fill('input[type=password]', password)
            for sel in ['button[type=submit]', 'button.primary', '#loginBtn']:
                if await page.locator(sel).count():
                    await page.click(sel); break
            await page.wait_for_timeout(2500)
        print('url', page.url)
        print('triggers', await page.locator('.hide-reason-trigger').count())
        print('cards', await page.locator('position-card').count())
        if await page.locator('.hide-reason-trigger').count()==0:
            print('body snippet', (await page.inner_text('body'))[:300])
            print('errors', errors[:5])
            await browser.close(); return
        trigger = page.locator('.hide-reason-trigger').first
        await trigger.scroll_into_view_if_needed()
        await trigger.click()
        await page.wait_for_timeout(250)
        info = await page.evaluate('''() => {
          const t = document.querySelector('.hide-reason-trigger');
          const pops = [...document.querySelectorAll('.hide-reason-popover')].map(p => ({
            hidden: p.hidden, parent: p.parentElement?.tagName, cls: p.className,
            top: p.style.top, left: p.style.left,
            rect: ((r)=> ({x:r.x,y:r.y,w:r.width,h:r.height}))(p.getBoundingClientRect()),
            display: getComputedStyle(p).display,
          }));
          return { aria: t?.getAttribute('aria-expanded'), pops };
        }''')
        print('INFO', info)
        print('ERRORS', errors[:8])
        await page.screenshot(path='/tmp/hide-reason-test.png', full_page=False)
        print('screenshot /tmp/hide-reason-test.png')
        await browser.close()

asyncio.run(main())
PY

rg -n "hide-reason|position-card|HideReason" relocation_jobs/static/dist/board.js | head -20; rg -n "hide-reason|closeHideReason|position-card" relocation_jobs/static/js/main.js | head -30; .venv/bin/python3 - <<'PY'
import asyncio
from playwright.async_api import async_playwright
import re
from pathlib import Path
env=Path('.env').read_text()
username=re.search(r'^PANEL_ADMIN_USER=(.*)$', env, re.M).group(1).strip().strip('"').strip("'")
password=re.search(r'^PANEL_ADMIN_PASSWORD=(.*)$', env, re.M).group(1).strip().strip('"').strip("'")

async def main():
    async with async_playwright() as p:
        browser = await p.chromium.launch(headless=True)
        context = await browser.new_context(
            viewport={"width": 430, "height": 932},
            has_touch=True,
            is_mobile=True,
            user_agent='Mozilla/5.0 (iPhone; CPU iPhone OS 16_0 like Mac OS X) AppleWebKit/605.1.15 (KHTML, like Gecko) Version/16.0 Mobile/15E148 Safari/604.1'
        )
        page = await context.new_page()
        errors=[]
        page.on('pageerror', lambda e: errors.append(str(e)))
        await page.goto('http://127.0.0.1:5051/panel', wait_until='networkidle')
        await page.fill('input[type=password]', password)
        for sel in ['#username','input[name=username]','input[type=text]']:
            if await page.locator(sel).count():
                await page.fill(sel, username); break
        await page.locator('button[type=submit], button.primary, #loginBtn').first.click()
        await page.wait_for_timeout(2500)
        trigger = page.locator('.hide-reason-trigger').first
        await trigger.scroll_into_view_if_needed()
        box = await trigger.bounding_box()
        print('trigger box', box)
        # touch tap
        await page.touchscreen.tap(box['x']+box['width']/2, box['y']+box['height']/2)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(300)
        info = await page.evaluate('''() => {
          const t=[...document.querySelectorAll('.hide-reason-trigger')].find(el => el.getAttribute('aria-expanded')==='true') || document.querySelector('.hide-reason-trigger');
          const pops=[...document.querySelectorAll('.hide-reason-popover')].filter(p=>!p.hidden).map(p=>({
            parent:p.parentElement?.tagName, cls:p.className, top:p.style.top, left:p.style.left,
            rect:((r)=>({x:r.x,y:r.y,w:r.width,h:r.height}))(p.getBoundingClientRect())
          }));
          return {aria:t?.getAttribute('aria-expanded'), openCount:pops.length, pops};
        }''')
        print('TOUCH INFO', info)
        print('ERRORS', errors)
        await page.screenshot(path='/tmp/hide-reason-touch.png')
        # second: wait longer then check still open
        await page.wait_for_timeout(500)
        info2 = await page.evaluate('''() => document.querySelectorAll('.hide-reason-popover:not([hidden])').length''')
        print('still open after 800ms', info2)
        await browser.close()
asyncio.run(main())
PY

content.text: Found it: the menu opens, but `_setRaised` puts the company card at `z-index: 10000` while the portaled popover stays at `220`, so it sits behind the card.

input.command:
.venv/bin/python3 - <<'PY'
import asyncio, re
from pathlib import Path
from playwright.async_api import async_playwright
env=Path('.env').read_text()
username=re.search(r'^PANEL_ADMIN_USER=(.*)$', env, re.M).group(1).strip().strip('"').strip("'")
password=re.search(r'^PANEL_ADMIN_PASSWORD=(.*)$', env, re.M).group(1).strip().strip('"').strip("'")

async def main():
    async with async_playwright() as p:
        browser = await p.chromium.launch(headless=True)
        page = await browser.new_page(viewport={"width": 430, "height": 932})
        await page.goto('http://127.0.0.1:5051/panel', wait_until='networkidle')
        for sel in ['#username','input[name=username]','input[type=text]']:
            if await page.locator(sel).count():
                await page.fill(sel, username); break
        await page.fill('input[type=password]', password)
        await page.locator('button[type=submit], button.primary, #loginBtn').first.click()
        await page.wait_for_timeout(2500)
        # force cache bust by checking script src
        src = await page.evaluate("() => document.querySelector('script[src*=position-card]')?.src")
        css = await page.evaluate("() => document.querySelector('link[href*=styles.css]')?.href")
        print('assets', src, css)
        trigger = page.locator('.hide-reason-trigger').first
        await trigger.scroll_into_view_if_needed()
        await trigger.click()
        await page.wait_for_timeout(250)
        info = await page.evaluate('''() => {
          const pop = document.body.querySelector('.hide-reason-popover.is-floating');
          if (!pop) return {ok:false};
          const r = pop.getBoundingClientRect();
          const z = getComputedStyle(pop).zIndex;
          const t = document.querySelector('.hide-reason-trigger[aria-expanded="true"]');
          const tr = t.getBoundingClientRect();
          return {ok:true, z, hidden:pop.hidden, top:pop.style.top, left:pop.style.left,
            rect:{x:r.x,y:r.y,w:r.width,h:r.height}, triggerY:tr.y, triggerBottom:tr.bottom,
            attachedAbove: r.bottom <= tr.top + 2 || r.top >= tr.bottom - 2};
        }''')
        print('INFO', info)
        await page.screenshot(path='/tmp/hide-reason-fixed.png')
        await browser.close()
asyncio.run(main())
PY

content.text:
The menu was opening the whole time — it was just painted **behind** the company card. Opening raised the card to `z-index: 10000` while the menu on `body` stayed at `220`.

That’s fixed (`z-index: 10050`, no card raise). Hard-refresh so you get `position-card.js?v=9` and `styles.css?v=86`, then try **Not for me** again — the menu should sit directly above the button.
